title: Navigate from home to About Company via site navigation
description: Verifies users can open the navigation menu from the home page and reach the About Company page.

steps.description: Click a section link for the about/company page
Verify the about/company content page is displayed

title: Navigate from home to Branches via site navigation
description: Verifies users can open the navigation menu from the home page and reach the branches listing page.

steps.description: Click a section link for the branches page
Verify the branches listing page content is displayed

title: Navigate from home to News Archive via site navigation
description: Verifies users can reach the news archive page from the home page navigation and see news summaries.

steps.description: Click the link to open the news archive
Verify a list of news summaries is displayed

title: Navigate from home to Projects Archive via site navigation
description: Verifies users can reach the projects archive page from the home page navigation and see project cards.

steps.description: Click the link to open the projects archive
Verify a list of project summaries is displayed

title: Navigate from home to Tenders Archive via site navigation
description: Verifies users can reach the tenders archive page from the home page navigation and see tender cards.

steps.description: Click the link to open the tenders archive
Verify a list of tender summaries is displayed

title: Verify core pages render primary content when opened directly
description: Verifies key informational pages load their primary content when accessed via static routes.

steps.description: Verify the about/company content page is displayed
Verify the branches listing page content is displayed

title: Open a news item from the archive and view its details
description: Verifies a user can select a news card from the archive and read the news details content.

steps.description: Verify the news details content is displayed

title: Open a news item using keyboard focus and view its details
description: Verifies a user can focus a news card via keyboard controls and open the news details page.

steps.description: Press Tab until a news card is focused
Press Enter to open the focused news item
Verify the news details content is displayed

title: News archive page loads and displays news summaries
description: Verifies the news archive page renders its list of news summaries.

steps.description: Verify a list of news summaries is displayed

title: Open a project from the projects archive and view its details
description: Verifies a user can select a project card from the archive and view the project details content.

steps.description: Verify the item details page content is displayed

title: Open a tender from the tenders archive and view its details
description: Verifies a user can select a tender card from the archive and view the tender details content.

steps.description: Verify the item details page content is displayed

title: Projects archive page loads and displays project summaries
description: Verifies the projects archive page renders its list of project summaries.

steps.description: Verify a list of project summaries is displayed

title: Tenders archive page loads and displays tender summaries
description: Verifies the tenders archive page renders its list of tender summaries.

steps.description: Verify a list of tender summaries is displayed

title: Run a keyword search and view matching results
description: Verifies users can submit a keyword search and see a list of matching results.

steps.description: Fill a common keyword into the search field
Verify matching search results are displayed

title: Search with a query that yields no results
description: Verifies the search experience shows a clear empty state when no matches are found.

steps.description: Fill a highly specific keyword into the search field
Verify a no-results empty state is visible

title: Attempt to submit an empty search query
description: Verifies the UI prevents submitting an empty query and provides guidance to enter search terms.

steps.description: Verify guidance to enter search terms is visible

title: Update the query and refresh the results list
description: Verifies users can change the entered keyword and re-submit to see updated results.

steps.description: Fill a common keyword into the search field
Replace the search field value with a different keyword
Verify matching search results are displayed

title: Search using leading and trailing whitespace
description: Verifies whitespace around the query does not break search submission and results rendering.

steps.description: Fill a keyword with leading and trailing spaces into the search field
Verify search results or a no-results empty state is displayed

title: Search with a long query string
description: Verifies the search page remains usable and provides feedback when a long query is submitted.

steps.description: Fill a long multi-word query into the search field
Verify search results or a no-results empty state is displayed
